description_long: This is a cylindrical portable stereo speaker with a light beige and gray color scheme, featuring a woven fabric mesh grille that wraps around most of its body. The front displays a prominent orange JBL logo centered on the grille. The ends of the cylinder are capped with circular passive radiators, each with a subtle JBL branding and a slightly recessed design. On the top surface, there is a row of tactile, raised control buttons for playback and volume, as well as a power button and Bluetooth pairing button. The back side includes a small control panel with indicator lights, a charging port, and an auxiliary input, all set into a smooth plastic strip. The overall design is modern and robust, suitable for outdoor or urban environments.
description: A cylindrical, portable JBL stereo speaker with a woven fabric grille, orange logo, and tactile control buttons on top. It features passive radiators on each end and a rear panel with ports and indicator lights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the woven fabric grille and centered orange JBL logo.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the circular passive radiator with JBL branding and a glimpse of the top control buttons.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the control panel with indicator lights, charging port, auxiliary input, and a smooth plastic strip.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other passive radiator and the top control buttons.
attribute_brand_logo: A rectangular orange logo with white 'JBL' text, centered on the front fabric grille.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grille features a tightly woven mesh fabric pattern, with small, uniform square openings and a subtle texture.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A row of raised, tactile buttons on the top surface, including playback, volume, power, and Bluetooth pairing controls, each with distinct icons.
